name: zombie_rider.live_cover_escape_mcw
description: Live cover/LOS rider row: one staged hostile rider behind an opaque wall records no target/no sight and no bow pressure, proving cover/indoor-style LOS break disrupts shooting instead of deleting the player through walls.

steps.label: post_load_rider_cover_escape_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: staged zombie-rider cover/LOS fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_rider_cover_escape
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected noon turn before live zombie-rider cover/LOS window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local noon before cover/LOS rider pressure window

steps.label: audit_saved_no_human_npcs_before_rider_cover_escape
steps.abort_reason: installed save still contained overmap NPC human targets before the zombie-rider cover/LOS window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-overmap metadata proves no NPC human target can substitute for the covered player

steps.label: audit_saved_zombie_rider_before_cover_escape
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required behind-cover rider footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one hostile zombie rider starts ten tiles east, behind the opaque wall

steps.label: audit_saved_opaque_wall_before_rider_cover_escape
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove the thick opaque locker wall between player and rider
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-map metadata proves a thick opaque locker wall stands between the player and staged rider before live turns advance

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_rider_cover_escape
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live cover/LOS window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_rider_cover_escape_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window records no target/no sight through the cover wall; same-run forbidden-line guards check that no bow-pressure live_plan was emitted

steps.label: audit_zombie_rider_cover_target_probe
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked zombie-rider no-target/no-sight probe lines for the cover/LOS window
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the staged rider did not acquire the covered player as a target

steps.label: audit_zombie_rider_cover_no_bow_pressure
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact contained bow-pressure or line-of-fire live_plan despite opaque cover/LOS setup
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact contains no zombie-rider bow-pressure or line-of-fire line through the cover wall

evidence_contract.claim: a staged live zombie rider behind opaque cover cannot acquire/shoot the player through the wall; cover/indoor-style LOS break disrupts rider bow pressure
evidence_contract.setup_guard: the run uses harness-only game_turn, remove-overmap-NPC, map_furniture, and active_monsters save transforms plus saved-turn/NPC/rider/wall audits before live turns; it does not claim natural discovery or full indoor navigation
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for zombie-rider cover/indoor escape behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this scenario proves bounded live target-acquisition/forbidden-bow behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
